findings.description: The requirement to test contrast levels using webaim.com or equivalent to meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for body, 3:1 for large text) is completely missing from the candidate rules list.

payload.text: Test all text and background pairs using webaim.com or equivalent to ensure compliance with WCAG AA minimum standards (4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text >=24px or 19px bold).

findings.description: Specific color combination restrictions, specifically the prohibition of Gold or Sunshine text on White (due to contrast failure) and their restriction to surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis, are missing.

payload.text: Do not use Gold or Sunshine text on White backgrounds as they fail contrast requirements. Limit Gold and Sunshine to surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

findings.description: The accessibility requirement prohibiting reliance on color alone to convey meaning is missing from the candidate rules list.

payload.text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; always pair color cues with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
